title: Automation Trigger when a subitem update is created
excerpt: I would like to know if this feature is available in Monday?

posts.author: RacerX (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to know if this feature is available in Monday?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RacerX Do you have more detail of what you hope to achieve? Are you hoping to have a trigger based on when a text comment is added?

You can have subitems trigger events eg if status changes?

image1017×577 26.4 KB

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @RacerX it’s indeed possible. What is the action you’re hoping to achieve with it?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@RacerX

I believe that the only trigger available for when an update is added to a subitem is this recipe:

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RacerX, @Clarey

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-11-23 at 11.46.072028×580 26.2 KB
